context: Tests whether the agent correctly builds a product JSON-LD schema using Schema.org types, handles single vs. aggregate offers, conditionally includes aggregate ratings, and uses proper availability URLs. Also tests Open Graph meta tag completeness and correct price formatting.

checklist.name: JSON-LD script tag
checklist.description: Structured data is output inside a <script type="application/ld+json"> tag (not microdata attributes in HTML elements)

checklist.name: Required Product fields
checklist.description: JSON-LD Product object includes all of: name, image (as array), description, sku, mpn, and brand (as an object with @type 'Brand')

checklist.name: Description truncation
checklist.description: Product description in JSON-LD uses a dedicated SEO/meta description field when available, otherwise truncates to 200 characters

checklist.name: Single vs aggregate offers
checklist.description: Single-variant products use @type 'Offer'; multi-variant products use @type 'AggregateOffer' with lowPrice, highPrice, and offerCount

checklist.name: Schema.org availability URLs
checklist.description: Offer availability uses full schema.org URL strings: 'https://schema.org/InStock' or 'https://schema.org/OutOfStock' (not short strings like 'instock')

checklist.name: Conditional aggregateRating
checklist.description: aggregateRating is only added to the Product schema when review count is greater than 0; products with no reviews do not include aggregateRating

checklist.name: AggregateRating fields
checklist.description: When present, aggregateRating includes ratingValue (formatted to 1 decimal place), reviewCount, bestRating: '5', worstRating: '1'

checklist.name: Price as decimal string
checklist.description: Prices in offers are formatted as a 2-decimal-place string (e.g. '19.99') converted from integer cents, not as raw integers

checklist.name: OG product type
checklist.description: Open Graph meta tags include og:type='product' and product:price:amount, product:price:currency, and product:availability

checklist.name: OG availability values
checklist.description: product:availability meta tag uses the correct OG values: 'instock', 'oos', or 'preorder' (not schema.org URL strings)

checklist.name: Breadcrumb JSON-LD
checklist.description: Page also includes a separate BreadcrumbList JSON-LD block with @type='BreadcrumbList' and itemListElement as a list of ListItem objects with position (1-indexed), name, and item (full URL)
